title: caricaceae
intro: The Caricaceae rank, also known as the Papaya family, is a classification of flowering plants that includes approximately 20 genera. This family is characterized by its members' often large, showy flowers and edible fruits. The Caricaceae family is primarily found in tropical regions around the world, including the Americas and parts of Asia. Its members are commonly known for their economic importance, as many species are cultivated for their fruit, which is rich in nutrients and has various culinary and medicinal uses.
